description: Multi-highway journeys between catalogue towns, built by python -m pipeline.build_journeys from OSRM driving routes. For each town pair, the catalogue's weather anchors that fall along the drive, in travel order, the highways it follows, and per highway the [first, last] mile the drive covers on it (its span, on the same measure axis as the crash bins). Committed so nothing depends on OSRM at build/run time; re-run only when the catalogue's towns change.
